FEDERAL EMPLOYEE SPECIALISTS

Your Service Deserves a Secure Retirement

Federal employees have one of the best benefits packages in the country — but maximizing FERS, TSP, FEGLI, and FEHB requires specialized expertise most advisors don't have. We speak your language.

SCHEDULE FEDERAL REVIEW →

Capital Wealth specializes in federal retirement — coordinating FERS, TSP, FEGLI, FEHB, and Social Security into one tax-efficient plan so you keep more of what you've earned.

Federal Employees Served 500+
Avg. FEGLI Savings per Year $3,200
Average TSP at Retirement $780K

EXPLORE FEDERAL BENEFITS

Every Benefit. One Clear Strategy.

Click any benefit area below for in-depth guidance, calculators, and planning resources.

FERS Retirement

Pension calculations, survivor benefits, retirement date optimization, FERS supplement, and special provisions for LEO/ATC/firefighters.

Learn More →

TSP Planning

Fund allocation across C, S, I, F, G, and L funds. Traditional vs. Roth TSP analysis, withdrawal strategies, and rollover decisions.

Learn More →

FEGLI Life Insurance

Coverage analysis, post-retirement cost projections, and comparison with private alternatives. Most federal retirees are over-insured.

Learn More →

FEHB Health Benefits

Keeping FEHB into retirement, Medicare coordination, plan selection, dental and vision options, and FSA strategies.

Learn More →

Social Security Coordination

FERS supplement bridge planning, WEP/GPO analysis, spousal benefit coordination, and optimal claiming strategies.

Learn More →

FERS Calculator

Estimate your FERS annuity based on years of service, high-3 salary, and retirement age. See the impact of different retirement dates.

Calculate Now →

Retirement Checklist

A comprehensive checklist covering every step from 5 years out to your last day. Don't leave anything on the table.

Get the Checklist →

THE PROBLEM

Does This Sound Familiar?

Most advisors don't understand FERS

They've never worked with federal employees. They don't know what a FERS supplement is, how SCD dates affect your pension, or how to coordinate TSP with your annuity.

You're drowning in acronyms

FERS, TSP, FEGLI, FEHB, VERA, VSIP, WEP, GPO — your benefits package is complex, and nobody has explained how it all works together.

You don't know when to retire

MRA, MRA+10, age 60, age 62 — which retirement eligibility applies to you? And when is it financially optimal to actually pull the trigger?

You're paying for FEGLI you don't need

FEGLI premiums skyrocket in retirement. Most federal employees are over-insured and don't realize private coverage could save them thousands.

You Deserve a Specialist

Your federal benefits are too valuable to leave to a generalist. Get a retirement plan built by advisors who work with federal employees every day.

SCHEDULE FEDERAL REVIEW →

THE SOLUTION

Specialized Federal Retirement Planning

We Speak Federal

Federal retirement isn't just a specialty — it's a core part of our practice. We understand FERS inside and out, from pension calculations to survivor benefit elections to the FERS supplement bridge. We coordinate every piece of your benefits package into a clear, tax-efficient retirement strategy.

Your federal benefits are complex, but they're also valuable. Our job is to help you maximize every dollar you've earned through decades of public service.

What We Optimize:

  • FERS pension calculations and timing strategies
  • Survivor benefit elections (full, partial, or none)
  • TSP allocation, Roth vs. traditional, and rollover strategies
  • FEGLI cost analysis and private insurance alternatives
  • FEHB into retirement and Medicare coordination
  • FERS supplement bridge planning (until age 62)
  • Social Security coordination and WEP/GPO analysis
  • Special provisions (LEO, ATC, firefighter retirement)

How it Works

It's just three steps

SCHEDULE FEDERAL REVIEW
Step 1) Benefits Analysis ▾

Review your SF-50, TSP statement, FEGLI coverage, and FEHB options to understand your full benefits package.

Step 2) Retirement Projections ▾

Model your FERS annuity, Social Security, TSP withdrawals, and taxes to determine your optimal retirement date.

Step 3) Coordination Strategy ▾

Integrate all federal benefits with your outside assets into a comprehensive retirement income and tax plan.

YOUR TIMELINE

Federal Retirement Planning Timeline

5 Years Before

Build Your Foundation

Review high-3 salary calculations, maximize TSP contributions, evaluate FEGLI options, and start building your withdrawal strategy.

2 Years Before

Refine Your Plan

Confirm service computation dates, plan TSP withdrawal strategy, analyze survivor benefit options, and project your annuity.

6 Months Before

Execute Your Transition

Submit retirement application, coordinate FEHB continuation, finalize income plan, and prepare for the transition.

COMMON QUESTIONS

Federal Benefits FAQ

Answers to the most common questions from federal employees.
